ddls:
CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the instrument (e.g., stock ticker) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of instrument (e.g., stock, commodity, currency) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the instrument (e.g., technology, energy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the instrument */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the instrument is listed or operates */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the instrument is traded */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the instrument is denominated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the instrument was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the instrument was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data feed */,
  "feed_name" TEXT /* Name of the data feed */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the data feed */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates (e.g., real-time, daily) */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Time of day when the data feed is updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the data feed (e.g., active, inactive, paused) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last successful data update */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Any error message associated with the data feed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data feed was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data feed was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data point */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument the data belongs to */,
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data feed used to collect the data */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the data point */,
  "gmtoffset" INTEGER /* GMT offset of the data point */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument at the data point */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument at the data point */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument at the data point */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument at the data point */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the instrument at the data point */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market data (e.g., API, file upload) */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the data (e.g., based on latency, accuracy) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the market data was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the market data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_feed_id FOREIGN KEY ("feed_id") REFERENCES data_feeds ("feed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data type was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being accessed */,
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data feed used to collect the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used to access the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_feed_id FOREIGN KEY ("feed_id") REFERENCES data_feeds ("feed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_versions_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feed_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data feed being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feed_versions_feed_id FOREIGN KEY ("feed_id") REFERENCES data_feeds ("feed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feed_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role being granted permission */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being accessed */,
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data feed being accessed */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_feed_id FOREIGN KEY ("feed_id") REFERENCES data_feeds ("feed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating the report */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being reported on */,
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data feed used to generate the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last updated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file (if stored as a file) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_feed_id FOREIGN KEY ("feed_id") REFERENCES data_feeds ("feed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_versions_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
